methods.description: Statistical analysis of beetle survival using life table methods to evaluate survival rates over time.

steps.description: Beetle survival was tested using the life table method (PROC LIFETEST).
steps.searchable_summary: perform life table survival analysis using PROC LIFETEST

steps.description: Data were right-censored after 40 days (experiment 1) or 42 days (experiment 6).
Multiple comparisons of survivorship functions used the log-rank test.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct log-rank test for survivorship function comparisons

steps.description: 95% CI on hazard rates were used to evaluate interval-specific mortality.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate 95% confidence intervals for hazard rates

methods.description: Analysis of variance and mixed-model design to test beetle population size, egg production, and cannibalism rates.

steps.description: Beetle population size, egg production, and cannibalism rates were tested by analysis of variance (ANOVA).
steps.searchable_summary: perform ANOVA on beetle population data

steps.description: Assumptions of normality were evaluated by visual examination of residual plots and homogeneity of variances by Levene's test.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate normality and homogeneity of variances

steps.description: Data were transformed where necessary to meet these assumptions.
steps.searchable_summary: transform data to meet normality and variance assumptions

steps.description: Net egg production and cannibalism of eggs by adults were tested using a repeated-measures, mixed-model design (PROC MIXED).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct repeated-measures mixed-model analysis using PROC MIXED

steps.description: Selection of covariance structure was based on graphical analysis and information criteria (AIC, SBC).
steps.searchable_summary: select covariance structure using AIC and SBC

methods.method_name: Logistic Regression and Contingency Table Analysis
methods.description: Logistic regression and contingency table analysis for testing population stage-structure and hatching success.

steps.description: Population stage-structure was tested using ordered logistic regression (PROC LOGISTIC).
steps.searchable_summary: perform ordered logistic regression on population stage-structure

steps.description: Hatching success was tested by contingency table analysis (PROC FREQ) or logistic regression (PROC LOGISTIC).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct contingency table analysis or logistic regression on hatching success
outputs: contingency table or logistic regression results

methods.description: Post-hoc analysis for multiple pairwise comparisons using Tukey adjustment.

steps.description: Post-hoc, multiple pairwise comparisons used the Tukey adjustment.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Tukey adjustment for multiple pairwise comparisons

steps.description: Selection of minimal display letter combinations for pairwise comparisons was based on a published algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: select minimal display letter combinations for pairwise comparisons
